case_title: JACQUELYN FU VS. PETER JOSIP GOETZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, JACQUELYN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY AMRITA AJMANI, PARALEGAL, REPRESENTING DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED AGAINST DEFENDANT PETER JOSIP GOETZ. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AGAINST DEFENDANT PETER JOSIP GOETZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS: L. FONG AND S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO PETER JOSIP GOETZ BY COURT AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-16-2016 AT 1:30 PM.
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAINTIFF UNABLE TO FORWARD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, JACQUELYN AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOETZ, PETER JOSIP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FU, JACQUELYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST PETER GOETZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD AS TO DEFENDANT GOETZ, PETER JOSIP
